name: Ayush Sinha
bio: Hi, I'm Ayush Sinha — a Data Scientist and ML Engineer passionate about building intelligent systems that solve real-world problems. I specialise in machine learning pipelines, deep learning models, and scalable big-data architectures.

From exploratory data analysis to deploying production-grade ML models, I thrive across the full data lifecycle. Fascinated by the intersection of AI research and engineering — always exploring NLP, computer vision, and generative AI.
heroHeading: Building Digital Experiences That Feel Alive.
